text: NAR Existing-Home Sales Report Shows 3.6% Decrease in March - National Association of REALTORS®
fullText: Existing-home sales decreased by 3.6% in March 2026. Month over month sales fell in all regions. Year over year sales rose in the South and West and declined in the Northeast and Midwest. Limited inventory continues to drive home prices up.
